scripts.test: sh -c 'localstorage_file=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/geohelper-vitest-localstorage.XXXXXX"); if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; NODE_OPTIONS="--localstorage-file=$localstorage_file${NODE_OPTIONS:+ $NODE_OPTIONS}" node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs "$@"; status=$?; rm -f "$localstorage_file"; exit $status' --
scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p apps/gateway/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p apps/control-plane/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p apps/worker/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/protocol/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/browser-bridge/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/agent-protocol/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/agent-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/agent-context/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/agent-intelligence/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/agent-sdk/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/agent-store/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/agent-tools/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/agent-memory/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/agent-evals/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/agent-domain-geometry/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/agent-bundle/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/agent-export-openclaw/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p tests/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.docker:gateway:build: docker build --build-arg GEOHELPER_BUILD_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short=12 HEAD) --build-arg GEOHELPER_BUILD_TIME=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) --build-context repo=. --file apps/gateway/Dockerfile --tag geohelper-gateway:local apps/gateway
